hypothesis: Agents that combine an LLM-conditioned structure generator fine-tuned on past failed proposals, an uncertainty-calibrated MLIP surrogate, and a multi-fidelity Bayesian acquisition function will discover at least 30% more DFT-validated novel stable compounds (distinct by StructureMatcher) within a fixed budget of B = 100 oracle queries on held-out ternary and quaternary chemical systems than a MatterGen+diversity baseline (two-sided test, p < 0.05).
